reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer la parada de mediodía yendo o viniendo de Bariloche a la costa. Si bien no sirven platos te pueden tostar los sándwiches y te armas el almuerzo. Tienen lugares para estacionar a la sombra.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop for lunch on your way to or from Bariloche and the coast. While they don't serve meals, they can toast sandwiches for you so you can make your own lunch. They have shaded parking available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQweUtmbGRnEAE
